title: Manifest Command Registry
description: Machine-readable inventory of every entity+command pair derivable from a compiled IR. Emitted by `manifest emit registries`. See docs/spec/registry/README.md.

irHash.description: Content hash of the IR this registry was derived from. Allows downstream consumers to detect drift.

compilerVersion.description: Version of the Manifest compiler that produced the IR.

policies.description: Names of IRPolicy entries that gate this command. May include entity defaultPolicies.

guardCount.description: Number of guard expressions on the command. Expressions themselves live in the IR; only the count is registered.

emits.description: Names of semantic events the command may emit on success.

effects.description: Distinct action kinds on the command body.
